prestazioni: Engine: Radical-tuned Ford EcoBoost 2.3L *GTD-2300* (closed-deck block, forged internals) with a custom *Turbosmart HTV500* wastegate and *Garrett GTX3582R Gen II* turbocharger, pushing 550whp on *VP Racing Q16* fuel with a *Syvecs S8 ECU* managing direct port injection and anti-lag strategies for sub-2.5s 0-60mph acceleration.

Suspension: *Öhlins TTX40 MkII* 3-way adjustable coilovers with *Radical-specific spherical bearing top mounts* and *Eibach ERS 1200N/mm* springs, paired with *Radical Motorsport* billet aluminum control arms and *AP Racing* 4-piston calipers clamping *380mm floating rotors* for 1.5g braking performance.

Drivetrain: *Hewland LD-200* sequential transaxle with *Penske* 3-way adjustable LSD, *Tilton* triple-plate carbon clutch, and *Radical* billet aluminum differential housing, mated to a *Quaife* ATB helical differential for optimal power delivery on high-speed corner exits.
estetica: Aerodynamics: *Radical Motorsport* carbon fiber *Rapture-Spec* front splitter with *Gurney flap* and *3D-printed NACA ducts* for brake cooling, paired with a *custom 3-piece rear wing* featuring *active DRS* (Drag Reduction System) controlled via *Syvecs ECU* for adjustable downforce (up to 1,200 lbs at 150mph).

Bodywork: *Full carbon fiber* monocoque chassis with *Radical* proprietary *AeroWeave* pre-preg layup, including *removable* front and rear clamshells for rapid crash repair, finished in *PPG* *Rapture Blue* with *matte clear coat* and *3M* *Scotchlite* reflective pinstriping for track visibility.

Interior: *Sparco* *Pro ADV* carbon fiber racing seat with *6-point Schroth* harnesses, *Motec C127* dash display integrated into a *Radical* billet aluminum steering wheel with *Pirelli* P Zero Trofeo R tire pressure sensors, and *Brembo* brake bias adjuster for real-time tuning.
